# nomad_job_parser (Data Source)

Parse a HCL jobspec and produce the equivalent JSON encoded job.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_job_parser" "my_job" {
  hcl = file("${path.module}/jobspec.hcl")
  canonicalize = false
}

data "nomad_job_parser" "my_job" {
  hcl = file("${path.module}/jobspec.hcl")

  variables = <<EOT
datacenter = "dc1"
image      = "nginx:latest"
EOT
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hcl` (String) Specifies the HCL definition of the job encoded in a JSON string.

### Optional

- `canonicalize` (Boolean) Flag to enable setting any unset fields to their default values.
- `variables` (String) HCL2 variables to pass to the job parser. Interpreted as the content of a variables file.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `json` (String) The parsed job as JSON string.
